creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 257672
audio/g4music.patch

Added port to audio/Makefile.

Removed excess lib depends (libatk,libcairo,libharfbuzz) because gnome uses handles it.

Added GLIB_SCHEMAS to Makefile.

Updated pkg-descr after feedback.

Updated g4music to 4.3.1.

Replaced gettext with gettext-tools because it is deprecated.

Updated git commit message but you'd like to remove my mail from git commit message.

Poudriere testport is fine on 142amd64-default.

I'll attach the changes I made as diff files.
